rounds: The 6am necklace buy without deliberating — they didn't get that one. The Saturday toe painting — didn't get that one either. Standing in the chemist comparing nail shades without flinching? That one stings them, because there were people around. The joy police are 0 for 3 on the visible, public, unapologetic stuff this week.
pattern: They're loud in your head but they keep arriving too late — the action's already done before they can stop it.
focus: Triniful Trial — wear the best-fitting piece for Matt
